// src/components/safety/TieredRestRecommendations.js import React from 'react'; import { Clock, Battery, AlertTriangle, CheckCircle, Calendar, Lock } from 'lucide-react'; import { useSafety } from '../../contexts/SafetyContext'; import { useSubscription } from '../../contexts/SubscriptionContext'; import TierContentManager from '../subscription/TierContentManager'; export const TieredRestRecommendations = ({ exerciseId, intensity }) => { const { getLastWorkout, getFatigueLevel } = useSafety(); const { hasTierAccess } = useSubscription(); const lastWorkout = getLastWorkout(exerciseId); const fatigueLevel = getFatigueLevel(); const getRestRecommendation = () => { const baseRest = { low: 24, moderate: 48, high: 72 }[intensity || 'moderate']; // Adjust based on fatigue level const fatigueMultiplier = 1 + (fatigueLevel / 10); return Math.round(baseRest * fatigueMultiplier); }; const getReadiness = () => { if (!lastWorkout) return 'ready'; const hoursSinceLastWorkout = (Date.now() - new Date(lastWorkout).getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60); const recommendedRest = getRestRecommendation(); if (hoursSinceLastWorkout < recommendedRest * 0.5) return 'notReady'; if (hoursSinceLastWorkout < recommendedRest) return 'cautious'; return 'ready'; }; const readiness = getReadiness(); const recommendedHours = getRestRecommendation(); // Basic Preview Content const BasicRestPreview = () => (

Proper rest between workouts is essential for recovery and progress.

Basic Rest Guidelines

  • • Allow 24-48 hours between workouts for the same muscle group
  • • Stay hydrated and get adequate sleep
); // Premium Preview Content const PremiumRestPreview = () => (

{readiness === 'ready' ? 'Ready for Exercise' : readiness === 'cautious' ? 'Proceed with Caution' : 'Rest Recommended'}

{recommendedHours} hours between sessions

); return (

Rest Recommendations

{/* Basic Tier - Simple Rest Guidelines */}

Proper rest is essential for recovery and progress. Here are some general guidelines:

General Rest Guidelines

  • • Allow 24-48 hours between workouts for the same muscle group
  • • Low intensity exercises require less rest than high intensity
  • • Stay hydrated and get adequate sleep for better recovery

Listen To Your Body

If you're feeling unusually tired or experiencing discomfort, it's okay to take an extra day of rest.

{/* Premium Upgrade Promo */}

Premium Feature

Upgrade to Premium for personalized rest recommendations based on your workout history and fatigue levels.

View upgrade options →
{/* Premium Tier - Personalized Rest Recommendations */} } > {/* Current Status */}
{readiness === 'ready' ? ( ) : ( )}

{readiness === 'ready' ? 'Ready for Exercise' : readiness === 'cautious' ? 'Proceed with Caution' : 'Rest Recommended'}

{readiness === 'ready' ? "You've had adequate rest. Good to go!" : readiness === 'cautious' ? "You might need more rest. Listen to your body." : "It's too soon to repeat this exercise. Take more rest."}

{/* Rest Details */}

Recommended Rest

{recommendedHours} hours between sessions

Current Fatigue Level

{fatigueLevel}/10 - { fatigueLevel <= 3 ? 'Low' : fatigueLevel <= 6 ? 'Moderate' : 'High' }

{lastWorkout && (

Last Workout

{new Date(lastWorkout).toLocaleDateString()} at{' '} {new Date(lastWorkout).toLocaleTimeString()}

)}
{/* Recommendations */}

Recovery Tips

  • Stay hydrated and maintain good nutrition
  • Get adequate sleep (7-9 hours)
  • Consider light stretching or walking on rest days
  • Monitor any unusual soreness or discomfort

{readiness === 'ready' ? "You've had adequate rest. Good to go!" : readiness === 'cautious' ? "You might need more rest. Listen to your body." : "It's too soon to repeat this exercise. Take more rest."}

Professional Recovery Plan

Based on your recent workouts and fatigue level, our professional trainers recommend:

Active Recovery

Light walking or gentle stretching to promote blood flow and recovery

Nutrition Focus

Protein-rich meals to support muscle repair and recovery

Sleep Optimization

Aim for 8 hours of quality sleep to maximize recovery

{/* Weekly Recovery Calendar */}

Weekly Recovery Calendar

{day}
))}

{type}

); }; export default TieredRestRecommendations;
